程序包 AccountType

类 AccountLog

java.lang.Object
AccountType.AccountLog
public class AccountLog extends Object
The type Account log use to generate Log and safe to specific file

  • 方法详细资料

    • setTransferLog

      public static void setTransferLog(String senderEmail, String senderAccountNumber, String receiverEmail, String receiverAccountNumber, double amount)
      Set transfer log.
      参数:
      senderEmail - the sender email
      senderAccountNumber - the sender account number
      receiverEmail - the receiver email
      receiverAccountNumber - the receiver account number
      amount - the amount

      ownerAccountNumber - the owner account number
      amount - the amount

      public static void setSavingLog(String ownerEmail, String ownerAccountNumber, double balance, String startTime, String endTime, double interestRate, int spanTime, double interest)

      ownerAccountNumber - the owner account number
      balance - the balance
      startTime - the start time
      endTime - the end time
      interestRate - the interest rate
      spanTime - the span time
      interest - the interest
